scope: PART2 §6.8 AI Investing 상세 구현 검증 (vs VAMOS_AI_INVESTING_SPEC)

mismatches.fact: PART2 기술스택 항목 1: 데이터 소스 = yfinance + Alpha Vantage
mismatches.detail: SOT §14 14-Item Locked table does not list 'yfinance + Alpha Vantage' as an item. SOT §14 lists infrastructure components (Airflow, Kafka, TimescaleDB, etc.). PART2 NOTE (XREF-S6-06) acknowledges this is a category-based reorganization. The SOT §15.1 data source priority lists yfinance as #1 and Alpha Vantage as #2, but these are not part of the 14-LOCK items.

mismatches.fact: PART2 기술스택 항목 7: ML Pipeline = scikit-learn + XGBoost
mismatches.detail: SOT §15 lists scikit-learn + XGBoost + LightGBM separately. PART2 groups into 'ML Pipeline' category. Not a value error but a restructuring. SOT §14 does not include these as LOCK items.

match_details.fact: Circuit Breaker: 일일 손실 -3% 거래 중지
핵심 아키텍처: Data Sources (yfinance) → 5-Agent Pipeline → Strategy Execution → 51% Gate → Paper Trading
match_details.detail: SOT §1.2 describes 5-Agent workflow: Perplexity→Gemini→ChatGPT→Claude→Copilot. Architecture flow matches.
SOT §14 item 4: TimescaleDB >= 2.13. Match on component.
SOT §14 item 8: Grafana >= 10.0. Match. Note: PART2 adds Prometheus which SOT §14 doesn't explicitly list, but §11 mentions monitoring panels.
SOT D-S3-05: 'VectorBT 조건부 ADOPT (전략 3개 이상 시 도입)'. Exact match.

missing.detail: PART2 §6.8 mentions 'Data Sources (yfinance)' in architecture but does not enumerate the 83 data sources or their tier classification.
PART2 §6.8 does not reference the 96 strategy catalog breakdown. Only mentions '5-Agent Pipeline → Strategy Execution' generically.
PART2 §6.8 uses simplified architecture ('Data Sources → 5-Agent Pipeline → Strategy Execution → 51% Gate → Paper Trading'). The 7-Layer data architecture from SOT is not referenced.

missing.sot_fact: 법적 제약: Wash Sale Rule (30일), PDT Rule ($25K), Uptick Rule (한국 공매도)
missing.detail: PART2 §6.8 does not include legal constraint rules. These are critical for P2 domain implementation.

check_details.sot_fact: 51% Gate 5 파라미터 (Win Rate, Sharpe, Decay, Min Trades, Split)

check_details.detail: PART2 L2723-2744 covers all 14 items, though reorganized by category.
PART2 does not include backtest engine configuration details.
PART2 L2700 mentions '5-Agent Pipeline' but does not list the 5 specific AI agents.

check_details.sot_fact: RSI_BB 전략 구현 상세 (27 파라미터 조합)
check_details.detail: PART2 does not reference RSI_BB specifics.
PART2 does not reference Grafana panel details.

check_details.sot_fact: Airflow DAG 스케줄링 (06:00 UTC 일일 배치)
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.8 does not include DAG scheduling details.
PART2 §6.8.1 covers RT-BNP integration with Kafka and consumer pattern.
PART2 P2 승인 흐름 (L2808) confirms '사용자 승인 필수' and Paper Trading only.
SOT specifies Python 3.12 for AI Investing but PART2/VAMOS uses Python 3.11+. Potential version conflict not surfaced in PART2.

findings.description: 83개 데이터 소스 상세 분류(P0/P1/S0/KB)가 PART2 §6.8에 미포함
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §3 defines detailed tier classification. PART2 only mentions 'yfinance' in architecture diagram.
AI_INVESTING_SPEC §7-8 lists 96 strategies. PART2 §6.8 only references generic '5-Agent Pipeline'.

findings.description: 법적 제약 시스템(Wash Sale Rule, PDT Rule, Uptick Rule)이 PART2 §6.8에 미포함
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §10.1 defines 3 legal rules with automatic order blocking. Critical for P2 domain compliance.

findings.description: Python 버전 불일치: AI_INVESTING_SPEC D-S5-01='Python 3.12 확정' vs VAMOS 전체='Python 3.11+'
findings.evidence: AI_INVESTING_SPEC §14.2 L455 states 'D-S5-01: Python 3.11 vs 3.12 → 3.12 확정'. PART2/CLAUDE.md specify Python 3.11+. AI Investing 모듈에서 3.12 전용 기능 사용 시 충돌 가능.

findings.description: PART2 기술스택 14항목 테이블이 SOT §14 원본과 카테고리/순서가 다르게 재구성됨
findings.evidence: PART2 L2726 NOTE (XREF-S6-06)에서 자체 인지. SOT §14는 인프라/도구 중심 14개, PART2는 기능 카테고리별 재구성. yfinance/Alpha Vantage 등은 SOT §14에 없는 항목.
